description_long: This is a medium-sized red onion with a bulbous, teardrop shape and a slightly glossy surface. The outer skin is a deep purplish-red, with several areas where the papery layer is partially peeled, revealing a smoother, slightly lighter layer beneath. The top of the onion features a short, green sprouting shoot, which is fresh and slightly curled. The base of the onion shows a small, dark root tuft, though the roots themselves are minimal and not very pronounced. The surface of the onion is mostly smooth with some natural undulations and minor blemishes typical of fresh produce. The overall appearance suggests a fresh onion that could be found in a market or dropped on an urban sidewalk.
description: A glossy, purplish-red onion with a partially peeled outer skin, a green sprouting shoot at the top, and a small root tuft at the base.
description_view_0: The onion is seen with a prominent patch of peeled skin on the left side and a visible green shoot at the top.
description_view_1: This view highlights a large, smooth area of the bulb with the green shoot more upright and the root tuft barely visible.
description_view_2: The onion appears rounder from this angle, with a crack in the skin and the green shoot slightly angled to the left.
description_view_3: A mostly unblemished, glossy surface is visible, with the green shoot curving forward and no root tuft visible.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with no distinct lobes or segments visible; the surface is mostly smooth with minor undulations.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is partially peeled, especially on one side, revealing a smoother, lighter layer beneath; the skin is purplish-red and has a dry, flaky texture.
attribute_root_tuft: A small, dark root tuft is present at the base, with minimal visible roots that are short and sparse.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: A single green shoot is visible at the top, fresh and slightly curled, extending a short distance upward.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: No urban elements or context are visible; the onion appears isolated on a plain, white background with no indication of indoor or outdoor placement.
